subcodes.first_line: The Pen of the Most High maketh mention of His friends at all times, and summoneth all unto the ocean of divine mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی دوستان خود را در کل احیان ذکر میفرماید و جمیع را ببحر رحمت الهی دعوت
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
